AppCanvas_Clear_DoesNotThrow()

Tests that the Clear command does not throw an exception when called

[TestMethod]
public void AppCanvas_Clear_DoesNotThrow()

AppCanvas_Constructor_SetDefaultPosition()

Tests that the canvas initialises with the correct default X and Y position (100, 100)

[TestMethod]
public void AppCanvas_Constructor_SetDefaultPosition()

Tests the MoveTo command correctly updates the X position of the canvas
